'''Nonak''' was a [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] poacher and hunter. Along with his brother [[Nodon]] and a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] deserter named [[Burrk]], they tried to hunt [[Wampa/Legends|wampas]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] (a highly illegal act) in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Nonak cared about his brother greatly. He was torn apart by a pack of wampas while saving him.

{{Char-stub}}
